creator: dom@myrddin.demon.co.uk
text:
Heinz Tschabitscher <semper@doubt.com> writes:

Have you considered looking at the color version of sc, by John Davis?

It's on space.mit.edu:/pub/davis/

It does depend on SLANG though (by the same author).
